user.title: Set up Inventory
user.description: Set up inventory tracking for your food storage locations.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only one Inventory integration is allowed.

init.title: Locations
init.description: Add a new location or manage one of your existing locations.

menu_option_descriptions.add_location: Create a new storage location using the default icon.
menu_option_descriptions.select_location: Rename a location, change its icon, or delete it.

add_location.title: Add Location
add_location.description: Create a new storage location. You can change its icon later if you want.

data_description.name: For example: Pantry, Fridge, Freezer, or Cupboard.

select_location.title: Select Location
select_location.description: Choose the location you want to update.

manage_location.title: Manage Location
manage_location.description: Choose what you want to change for {location_name}.

menu_option_descriptions.rename_location: Update the display name or icon shown in Home Assistant.
menu_option_descriptions.delete_location: Remove this location and all items stored in it.

rename_location.title: Rename Location
rename_location.description: Update the name and icon for this location.

data_description.name: The name shown in Home Assistant.
data_description.icon: Optional Material Design Icons value, for example mdi:package-variant.

delete_location.title: Delete Location
delete_location.description: Are you sure you want to delete '{location_name}'? This will remove {item_count} item(s).

error.name_exists: A location with this name already exists.
